snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Durable user Backup recovery and Settings ownership exact-hash review
reviewers.independence: UI Design independently reviewed the exact c4fca11d Development candidate read-only, including restarted Backup ownership, fixed localized state/action rules, raw-detail exclusion, rollback-child suppression, current last-backup truth and unchanged Restore surfaces. It returned ACCEPTED/CLEAR and requested no prototype or candidate edit.

dimensions.summary: Existing Data, Job, API, Settings, UI, Quality and Playbook sections locate the durable Backup lifecycle and one Settings owner without a new document, page or prototype.

Owners agree on pre-scan durable Job creation, five exact checkpoints, identity-bound adoption, no-replace archive publication, schema-v1 Operation limits, manifest authority, rollback-child reuse and body-free Settings summaries.

Five exact selectors update only existing partial Backup, Job, API, Settings, I18N and Exit projections; semantic lock v3 has 1,189 claims and every Requirement, Exit and phase status remains unchanged.

Development gets one executable Backup contract covering coordinator composition, exact checkpoint/restart/cancel/retry/CAS behavior, truthful manifest ranges, safe Job summaries, restarted Settings ownership and rollback recovery.
No Markdown file or decision is added; owner and JSON compression keeps all five leanness gates green without raising the 56-file, 1,213,000-byte or 250,000-byte trace budgets.

verification.evidence: The exact twenty-path Development plus ten-path governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package and downloaded-distribution evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 4/95 and 6/161, full 103/1,162, typecheck/build, unified Agent and worker smokes pass. The 160,600,780-byte macOS ZIP passes ordinary and independent downloaded-distribution smoke with strict ad-hoc integrity and zero post-seal writes.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 57 dependency records with zero waivers; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,189 pass with no Requirement, Exit or phase status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 entry words, 4,422 trace lines, 249,489 trace bytes and 1,212,507 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Durable user Backup recovery and Settings ownership
coordination.compatibility: This candidate makes user Backup Job-first and restart-safe while preserving schema v1, Restore identities, provider/permission behavior and all statuses. It adds no page, dependency, migration or platform-support claim.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact twenty-path bytes and executable evidence. UI Design returned exact-hash ACCEPTED/CLEAR. Product Planning synchronized seven existing owners, acceptance, semantic lock and this current-only recipe without changing Development files.

nonBlockingRisks: Schema-v1 backup_created binds Job, vault, Backup and archive digest; richer inclusion, dependency and policy facts remain manifest-owned until a versioned Operation migration.
External managed source roots remain unsupported and fail closed; explicit incomplete/external transport controls remain open.
Final-syscall TOCTOU, general cross-file transactionality and old-source cleanup remain open.
Windows packageability must be rerun online for the main/renderer/contracts delta; no new Windows claim is made.
Broader installed/signed platform recovery and Public Alpha backup/restore scenario evidence remain open.
